Section.name: UNCLASSIFIED
Section.Content: SD - License Management - CSP License Rental Standard Service Description Prepared for: <Customer name> Prepared by: Jurgen De Gols Date: [Publish Date] Cegeka reference: -[Comments] README for (pre)sales Specify the field <Customer name> (name of the targeted customer) Document can be used in two ways: DELETE THIS PAGE FOR CUSTOMERS README for product managers This document is the template for the commercial description of solutions. As the name states, the goal is to have a commercial attractive description of a solution, which can be used as a standard informative document towards the customer, or as input text for another offer/proposal document (cross solution & customizable). The prime focus should be on capturing the needs and added value for the customer, and not on a fully-inclusive textual description of the service (which is for the (legal) service description) How to use the template: DELETE THIS PAGE FOR CUSTOMERS Document history for product managers Version Date Comment Author 0.1 04/10/2024 Initial version of standard service description Jurgen De Gols DELETE THIS PAGE FOR CUSTOMERS Table of Contents 1 Standard Service Description 6 1.1 Introduction 6 1.2 What is the added business value? 6 1.2.1 Flexibility 7 1.2.2 Scalability 7 1.2.3 Cost-efficiency 7 1.2.4 Security 7 1.2.5 Always up-to-date 7 1.2.6 Ease of management 8 1.3 What is included in the service? 8 1.3.1 Standard services 8 1.3.2 Optional services 8 1.3.3 Responsibility matrix 8 1.4 SKU overview 9 1.4.1 Service SKUs 9 1.4.2 Standard changes SKUs 9 1.4.3 Non-standard changes SKUs 10 1.5 Service Level Agreement 10 1.5.1 Service Support window 10 1.5.2 Specific service levels 10 1.5.3 Service delivery location 10 1.6 Conditions 10 1.7 Out of scope 11 1.8 Cross-functional services 11

Section.name: Introduction
Section.Content: The My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service is an optional service for customers using Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktop and / or Citrix Daas. It provides a flexible licensing program to these customers, based on actual consumption of the environment. 2 license types can be provided with this service.

Section.name: What is the added business value?
Section.Header: What is the added business value?
Section.Content: The My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service allows customers to make use of a Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops and / or Citrix DaaS environment without purchasing or subscribing licenses themself. Cegeka counts the actual usage and invoices the customer monthly on the actual used licenses.

Section.name: Flexibility
Section.Content: Licenses are counted based on actual usage of the environment.

Section.name: Scalability
Section.Content: Customers do not need to think about how many licenses are needed for their environment, Cegeka will make sure that sufficient licenses are available in every scenario (upscale / down)

Section.name: Cost-efficiency
Section.Content: Licenses are only counted for actual usage of the environment. Customers do not need to provide additional licenses for peak usage.

Section.name: Security
Section.Content: The My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service allows the usage of the latest products, therefore increases security.

Section.name: Always up-to-date
Section.Content: CSP Licenses always allow the usage of the latest products, features and updates of all products related to Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops and Citrix DaaS.

Section.name: Ease of management
Section.Content: Licenses are always available, independent on the usage of the environment.

Section.name: What is included in the service?
Section.Header: What is included in the service?

Section.name: Standard services
Section.Content: Cegeka will provide the following standard functionalities and corresponding activities in the My Brokering – Citrix CSP licensing Service:

Section.name: Responsibility matrix
Section.Content: Responsibility Matrix below provides the appropriate RACI tags for Customer and Cegeka with respect to the activities for the Standard and Optional Services. ACTIVITY MATRIX CEGEKA Customer Standard services License Management Maintain licenses and support contract with Citrix MONITOR license CAPACITY Configure and maintain license server(s) Assign / Configure licenses on the license server(s) Report on MONTHLY license usage = Responsible: Party responsible for performing the activity and/or achieve the task. One party is Responsible, although other Parties can be delegated to assist in the actual work if required. An Accountable must sign off (approve) on work that Responsible provides. Responsible is by default proactive. = Accountable: Party ultimately accountable for the correct and thorough completion of the task and/or activity as performed by Responsible. For each task and/or activity exactly one Accountable must be specified. Accountable has the mandate to accept/dismiss on work provided by Responsible. Accountable is by default reactive. = Consulted: Party to be consulted (whose opinions are sought in two-way communication) when performing tasks and/or activities. Consulted may also provide requirements on scope, result expectations, etc. Consulted is by default reactive. = Informed: Party to be informed / kept up-to-date on tasks and/or activities (just one-way communication). Informed often only on completion of the task and/or activity. Informed no formal role in realization and therefore by default reactive.

Section.name: Service SKUs
Section.Content: Monthly SKU Unit OF MEASUREMEnt STANDARD SERVICES BASE SKUs DWP Brokering - Citrix CSP2.0 User License Per Monthly Unique Active User DWP Brokering - Citrix Netscaler VPX Per Netscaler Pair

Section.name: Standard changes SKUs
Section.Content: Table below represents the Standard Changes for this Service, where each Standard Change Standard Change Category N/A N/A

Section.name: Non-standard changes SKUs
Section.Content: Non-standard changes NON-Standard Change Category N/A N/A

Section.name: Service Support window
Section.Content: Table below gives an overview of the applicable Service Support Windows for each Standard & Optional service Service windows description SERVICE CEGEKA Office hours 8x5: 9AM – 5PM, Monday up to and including Friday All standard services CEGEKA extended office hours 12x5: 7AM – 7PM, Monday up to and including Friday N/A cegeka 24x7 24x7 All optional services

Section.name: Specific service levels
Section.Content: This service makes use of a third party PAAS provider. For the SLA’s concerning uptime and/or availability of the 3 rd party platform we refer to the following documentation Service Level Agreements (SLA) for Online Services Service Level Agreement | Citrix Cloud

Section.name: Service delivery location
Section.Content: This Service is delivered from Belgium, The Netherlands and Romania.

Section.name: Cross-functional services
Section.Content: In order to guarantee the Service quality, Cegeka refers to the cross-functional Services from the contract document set and their corresponding standard KPI's.
